prompt: A realistic screenshot of a modern code editor interface, featuring a light theme and python code about recursion inspired by the reference image style, displaying example code within the UI.
prompt_refined: Generate a realistic screenshot of a modern code editor interface featuring a clean light theme. The layout should mirror image 1, with a primary code editing pane on the left and an integrated chat or AI assistant panel on the right. The main code pane should display example Python code clearly illustrating a recursive function (e.g., Fibonacci sequence or factorial), complete with syntax highlighting and line numbers. The application window should include a minimalist macOS-style title bar with traffic light buttons positioned at the top-left, consistent with the overall aesthetic of image 1.
objects: Primary code editing pane on the left
Integrated chat or AI assistant panel on the right
Example Python code illustrating a recursive function
Traffic light buttons on the top-left
